title: Tokenized Treasury Fund
description: Proof-gated RWA settlement on Stellar testnet. Eligibility verified privately; settlement enforced by PolicyVerifier at transfer time.

title: Commercial Real Estate Token
description: US-jurisdiction selective disclosure for tokenized real estate exposure. Same on-chain policy gate with stricter issuer attestation.

title: Private Credit Note
description: Accredited investor eligibility with proof-of-funds threshold. Institutional-grade compliance gate before RWA transfer.

title: USDC Treasury Settlement
description: Proof-gated USDC SAC settlement via ComplianceSacAdmin. Real testnet USDC moves with eligibility verified in zero knowledge.

title: CompliantDEX — USDC Swap
description: Swap into proof-gated USDC through CompliantDEX. One registry, shared IssuerRegistry and RwaAdapter verification path.

title: CompliantPayroll — USDC Payout
description: Regulated payroll-style USDC payout with compliance verified before funds move. Demonstrates reusable compliance layer across dApps.
